q: What exactly happens at a Content Day?
a: You'll get professionally directed video content and premium headshots — all shot inside a multimillion-dollar luxury home. We guide you on what to say, how to pose, and capture content that positions you as the go-to agent in your market.

q: What should I wear or bring?
a: Wear solid colors that reflect your personal brand — avoid loud prints. Bring a backup outfit if you're unsure, and we'll help you choose.
Plan for 45–60 minutes. You'll check in, shoot your video and photos with expert direction, pick out your headshot and be on your way — no fluff, no awkward downtime.
